# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

def myCommand = {
    stage 'build'
        sh 'mvn -f /Users/jdoe/myproject.xml clean install'
    
    stage 'test'
         sh 'cd /Users/jdoe && python mytest.py'

    stage 'deploy'
         sh 'cd /Users/jdoe && mvn deploy'
}

def buildParameters = [:]
buildParameters.put('command', myCommand)

pipeline{
    parameters{
        string(name:'command', description: 'Enter the command to execute', defaultValue: '')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression {
                    params.command != null && params.command != ''
                }
            }

            steps {
               script{
                    def myCommand = params.command.toString()

                    sh myCommand
               }
            } 
        }
    }
}
